description_long: This armchair features a modern, rounded design with a smooth, continuous backrest and armrests that seamlessly blend into the seat. The upholstery is a soft, solid yellow-orange fabric, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The seat cushion is thick and plush, providing ample comfort, while the backrest curves gently to support the sitter. The armrests are fully integrated into the chair's body, offering a padded and upholstered surface. The chair stands on four slightly splayed, tapered wooden legs in a light natural finish, adding stability and a touch of Scandinavian style. The overall look is minimalist yet cozy, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban settings.
description: A modern, rounded armchair with soft yellow-orange upholstery and tapered wooden legs, featuring integrated padded armrests and a plush seat cushion.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, inviting seat, rounded backrest, and integrated armrests with visible plush cushioning.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the gentle curve of the backrest and armrest, as well as the thickness of the seat cushion and the splayed wooden leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, continuous backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest's curve, seat depth, and the sturdy wooden leg.
attribute_armrest_design: padded and upholstered, integrated with chair body, rounded
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, rounded, continuous with armrests, smooth upholstery
attribute_leg_type: tapered wooden legs, light finish, slightly splayed
